zh.Bodfari, Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Wales: 威爾士福林爾波德法利
zh.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan是Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn的女兒，於大約1265年出生。她和Robert ap Iorwerth至少有7個兒子和6個女兒。

zh-hans.Bodfari, Ysceifiog, Flintshire, Wales: 威尔士福林爾波德法利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan是Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn的女儿，于大约1265年出生。她和Robert ap Iorwerth至少有7个儿子和6个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Vychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Adles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Able , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Americanized form of German and Dutch   Abels  .

variants.name: Able
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the younger son of Adam and Eve, who was murdered for reasons of jealousy by his brother Cain (Genesis 4:1–8). The Hebrew form is Hevel, ostensibly representing the vocabulary word hevel ‘breath, vapour’, and so taken to imply vanity or worthlessness. Abel is considered by the Christian Church to have been a pre-Christian martyr (see Matthew 23:35), and is invoked as a saint in the litany for the dying. Nevertheless, his name has not been much used either before or after its brief vogue among the Puritans.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: compound of iud ‘lord, prince’ + hael ‘generous’; borne in the Mabinogi by the son of Llarian.

en.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan was born about 1265 as the daughter of Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn. She had at least 7 sons and 6 daughters with Robert ap Iorwerth.

fr.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan est née environ 1265, fille de Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn. Elle a eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles avec Robert ap Iorwerth.

de.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan wurde um 1265, als Tochter von Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn geboren. Sie hatte mit Robert ap Iorwerth mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan è nata il circa 1265 come figlia di Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn. Lei avuto almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie con Robert ap Iorwerth.

ko.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan(은)는 대략 1265년 Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert ap Iorwerth(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan nasceu aproximadamente 1265 filha de Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn. Ela teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas com Robert ap Iorwerth.

ru.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan родилась около 1265 г. Её отца звали Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn. У неё было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Robert ap Iorwerth.

es.lifeSummary: Adles verch Ithel Vychan nació aproximadamente 1265 como hija de Ithel Fychan Lord of Mostyn. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas con Robert ap Iorwerth.
